title: Doves and Cacti
description: A farming modpack with a focus on creating a more calm and explorative version of Minecraft with a slower pace.
body:
GALLERY IMAGES ARE TEMPORARY 

Doves and Cacti is a WIP vanilla+ modpack based around the idea of making minecraft a calmer more slow paced game through an overhaul to exploration, farming, and caving. Alongside this is the addition of new animals and mobs to create a larger more immersive world ingame.

The biggest change in the pack is the removal of the End as a dimension which is done to slow down the game. The elytra, shulkers and Chorus Fruit will eventually be available 

The pack features over 20 new crops, 70 new mobs, and 30 new biomes alongside overhauls of existing biomes

Mods Featured:
- Farmer's Delight and it's addons overhaul farming and Cooking
- Create and its addons for the technical player
- Spelunkery, YUNG's Cave Biomes, Galosphere, and Wilder Wild to overhaul Caving
- Chococraft 4, Fowl Play, Critter's & Companions, Cafe's Birding, Friends & Foes, Jagm's Kiwis, YDM's Red Panda and Fennec Fox, among other mods to create more immersion in the world
- Wilder Wild and William Wyther's Overworld Overhaul work to make to existing biomes feel new and exciting
- Ender Zoology adds in more enemies to fight to keep the game interesting
- Hexcasting and Bewitchment add in magical spells for the player to explore
- Sacks, Storage Drawers, Inmis, and Scout come together to overhaul storage and the inventory

Does not run with Sodium installed

Full Slabs mod for 1.20.1 is available here: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/full-slabs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/full-slabs)
Firefly Bush Backport is available here:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/firefly-bush](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/firefly-bush)
